seoTitle: South Wolumla vs Southampton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Wolumla and Southampton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Wolumla vs Southampton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Wolumla and Southampton.
heading: South Wolumla vs Southampton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Wolumla, New South Wales and Southampton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Southampton has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to South Wolumla (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Wolumla or Southampton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Wolumla has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Southampton scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Wolumla scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Southampton scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Wolumla or Southampton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Southampton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
